meta.name: apex
meta.title: Apex Skill
meta.description: Guidelines and best practices for Apex development on the Salesforce Platform Triggers on: **/*.cls, **/*.trigger

original_definition.skill_description: Guidelines and best practices for Apex development on the Salesforce Platform Triggers on: **/*.cls, **/*.trigger

actions.name: Write clear and concise comments for each class and method,
actions.description: Write clear and concise comments for each class and method, explaining the business logic and any complex operations.

actions.name: Handle edge cases and implement proper exception handling wi
actions.description: Handle edge cases and implement proper exception handling with meaningful error messages.

actions.name: Focus on bulkification - write code that handles collections
actions.description: Focus on bulkification - write code that handles collections of records, not single records.

actions.name: Implement proper separation of concerns using service layers
actions.description: Implement proper separation of concerns using service layers, domain classes, and selector classes.

actions.name: Use collections (`List<>`, `Set<>`, `Map<>`) to process mult
actions.description: Use collections (`List<>`, `Set<>`, `Map<>`) to process multiple records efficiently.

actions.name: update account; // DML in a method designed for single recor
actions.description: update account; // DML in a method designed for single records

actions.name: Use Maps for efficient lookups - Convert lists to maps for O
actions.description: Use Maps for efficient lookups - Convert lists to maps for O(1) constant-time lookups instead of O(n) list iterations.

actions.name: Use `Map<Id, SObject>` constructor to quickly convert query
actions.description: Use `Map<Id, SObject>` constructor to quickly convert query results to a map.

actions.name: Implement SOQL for loops for processing large data sets.
actions.description: Implement SOQL for loops for processing large data sets.

actions.name: Create custom exception classes for specific error scenarios
actions.description: Create custom exception classes for specific error scenarios.

actions.name: Log exceptions appropriately for debugging and monitoring.
actions.description: Log exceptions appropriately for debugging and monitoring.

rules.description: Always use the latest Apex features and best practices for the Salesforce Platform.
Be mindful of governor limits and design solutions that scale efficiently.
Always write bulkified code - Design all code to handle collections of records, not individual records.
Avoid SOQL queries and DML statements inside loops.
Ideal for matching related records, lookups, and avoiding nested loops.
Be aware of Salesforce governor limits: SOQL queries (100), DML statements (150), heap size (6MB), CPU time (10s).
Monitor governor limits proactively using `System.Limits` class to check consumption before hitting limits.
List<Account> accounts = [SELECT Id, Name FROM Account WHERE IsActive__c = true LIMIT 200];
Always check CRUD/FLS permissions before performing SOQL queries or DML operations.
Use `WITH SECURITY_ENFORCED` in SOQL queries to enforce field-level security.

directives.description: Document external dependencies, integration points, and their purposes in comments.
Classes: Use `PascalCase` for class names. Name classes descriptively to reflect their purpose.
Methods: Use `camelCase` for method names. Use verbs to indicate actions.
